adventure_context: Beneath the moss-choked ruins lies the Sunken Vault of Xylos, a blue-tiled labyrinth where the scent of ancient dust hangs heavy over mosaics of a weeping sun. Brave the shadows of these crumbling corridors to reclaim the lost hoard of a faceless king, but beware the skeletal sentinels who have kept vigil for a thousand years. The party is currently on room #1.
